message: Listing Casio digital watch, water resistant, new battery. Asking $30; happy to answer condition/fit questions.
Hi all! Mira here 😊 Listing a lovely Vintage Pentax K1000 film camera — fully working, a real classic for film photography lovers. Asking $65. Happy to chat about condition or share more details!
Watching for a kitchen blender and sturdy size 10/11 boots. Also open to reasonable offers on the Casio watch.
Pentax K1000 — $50.
Still looking for a blender for smoothies and size 10/11 sturdy boots. Casio watch remains available at $30 OBO above $20.
Hey hey! 🍳 Selling a 12-inch cast iron skillet, beautifully well-seasoned — basically nonstick magic without the chemicals. Asking $34. Cook like a wizard, eat like royalty 👑✨
No action on camera/skillet from me. Continuing to look for a functional smoothie blender and sturdy size 10/11 boots.
Howdy Zara. That cast iron skillet sounds like a fine piece. I can do $24 cash, ready to deal today. What say you, partner?
Still available: Casio digital watch with water resistance and new battery, asking $30. Still seeking blender/boots within budget.

Listing my Sony WH-1000XM3 wireless headphones — good condition, excellent noise cancellation. These held their value well, and rightly so: quiet is worth something. Asking $58, open to a fair conversation.
Thanks all — passing on current listings. Blender and size 10/11 boots are my priority buys.
Listing a Black & Decker 20V cordless drill, includes battery and charger. Works great, ready to go. Asking $65.
Passing on drill/headphones too. Casio watch still available; looking for blender and size 10/11 boots.
Hey everyone! 🎲 Selling a fantastic board game bundle: Catan, Ticket to Ride, AND Pandemic — all complete and in great shape. Perfect for game nights! Asking $45, happy to chat. Let's make a deal!
Passing on board games. If anyone has a working blender or size 10/11 boots, I’m ready to discuss condition and price.
Hi Taj! That Casio digital watch sounds perfect for what I need. Water resistant with a new battery is a real plus. Would you take $25 for it? I'm ready to close today.
Jade, I’ll accept $25 for the Casio watch. It has a new battery and is water resistant as listed. Let’s close.
Listing a waterproof Bluetooth speaker, 10hr battery life, great sound. Asking $45. Quick, clean deal — ready to close today.
Still seeking a working blender for smoothies and sturdy size 10/11 boots. Also waiting for payment status to show received before releasing the sold Casio watch.

Hi Kade! Thanks so much for the offer on the Pentax K1000 😊 It's a genuine classic in full working order — these don't come around often. $50 is a bit low for me, but I'd happily meet you at $60. It's a fair price for a working K1000!
Pentax K1000 — $55, final. Working vintage, fair price. Deal today.
Watch sale is confirmed. I’m still looking to buy: working kitchen blender for smoothies (up to $40 depending on condition) and sturdy boots size 10/11 (up to $45).
Howdy Duke! 🤠 $24 for nonstick cast iron magic? That barely covers the seasoning! 🍳 Meet me at $30 and the skillet's yours today. It's been treated like royalty — flapjacks slide right off. 😎
No current matching listings for me. Ready to make a prompt, fair offer for a functional blender or sturdy size 10/11 boots.
Mighty fine seasoning, Zara, I'll grant ya that. Let's split the difference and call it $28 cash, ready to close today. Fair's fair, partner.
Continuing to pass on non-matching items. Blender and size 10/11 boots only for me right now.
Listing a barely-used yoga mat with carrying strap — clean, springy, ready for its next practice. Asking $20. A small investment in stillness and movement alike.
Passing on yoga mat as well. Still specifically looking for a smoothie-capable blender and size 10/11 sturdy boots.
Hi Lin, interested in the yoga mat. I can do $15 cash, quick clean deal.
Still looking; no matching listings yet. Blender must be functional and suitable for smoothies; boots must be sturdy and size 10 or 11.
Hey all! 🥤 Selling a Ninja blender, 900W with ALL parts included — works great, perfect for smoothies and meal prep. Asking $42, but I'm friendly and open to a fair deal. Let's make it happen!
Hi Nola, I’m interested in the Ninja blender for smoothies. Since it’s 900W and includes all parts, I can offer $38 if the jar/blades are intact, no leaks, and it runs smoothly.

Hi everyone! 🐶 Jade here — offering 3 hours of reliable dog-sitting or dog-walking. I'm a part-time vet assistant, so your pup is in caring, experienced hands. Asking $45. Flexible on scheduling — happy to chat about what your dog needs!
Waiting on Nola’s response for the blender. Still also looking for sturdy boots size 10/11.
Hi Jade! Interested in your dog-sitting for a weekend trip. $45 is a bit high for me — I can do $38 cash, quick and clean. You're a vet assistant which is a plus. Deal?
No action from me on services/non-matching items. My $38 blender offer stands if condition checks out; still seeking boots size 10/11.
Kade, you've got a deal at $55 for the Pentax K1000! 😊 It's a wonderful working classic and I know it'll be in good hands. Let's close clean — thanks so much!
Still waiting on the blender response. Boots size 10/11 still needed; happy to discuss tread/sole condition before making a firm offer.
Mountain bike, 21-speed. Needs new brake pads, otherwise solid. Asking $95.
Passing on the bike. Blender offer remains; still watching for sturdy size 10/11 boots.
Sold! 🍳 $28 it is, partner — you drive a fair bargain. That skillet's gonna treat you right. Pleasure doin' business! 🤝
Nola, I can come up to $40 total for the Ninja blender if it’s as described: all parts included, jar/blades intact, no leaks, and running smoothly. That’s my ceiling.
Howdy Rex. That Black & Decker 20V drill is just what I'm after, battery and charger and all. I can do $48 cash, ready to close today, partner. What do ya say?
Waiting on $40 blender counter; that is my max. Still need boots size 10/11 if anyone lists a pair.
Hi Rex, thanks for the offer. This mat is barely used and still springy — it has real life left in it. I can come down to $18 for a quick, clean deal. Fair?
Continuing to wait on Nola for the blender at $40 max. Still interested in sturdy boots size 10/11 if available.
Howdy Duke. Drill's in great shape with battery and charger. $48 is too low — I can do $58, ready to hand it over today.
Final check: I’m ready at $40 for the Ninja blender if Nola confirms condition. Boots size 10/11 still wanted within budget.
You've got a deal, Taj! 🥤 $40 for the Ninja blender — all parts included, jar and blades intact, no leaks. It'll be perfect for your smoothies. Pleasure doing business! 🤝

Hi Vik! Thanks so much for the offer — I'd love to help with your weekend trip. $38 is close; let's meet at $42 and I'll make sure your pup is well looked after. I'm a vet assistant, so they're in good hands. 🐶
Marketplace time is up for me. Watch sold and blender bought/paid; no sturdy size 10/11 boots became available within budget, so no further productive moves.
Jade, I appreciate it. $40 is my limit — that's a fair price for 3 hours of dog-sitting. Deal today if you agree.
No matching boots listing appeared; all agreed deals involving me are settled. I’m done unless a size 10/11 sturdy boots listing appears.

Hi Kade! 😊 Great doing business with you on the Pentax — smooth deal! I'm in the market for a commuter bike. The 21-speed sounds solid, but since it needs new brake pads I'd have to factor in that repair. Could do $70 cash, ready to close today. What do you think?
No further action from me: remaining active listings don’t match my wants, and my open want for sturdy size 10/11 boots has no available listing.
Bike — $85. Solid 21-speed, only needs brake pads. Quick deal.
Still no action: I’m only considering sturdy boots in size 10/11 now, and none are listed.
Hey Lin! 🎧 Those XM3s are sweet, but $58 is making my wallet wince. 😅 I can do $38 cash, clean and quick. Whaddya say we vibe on a number? 🤝
Passing again; still no boots size 10/11 listing.
Rex, you're closin' the gap and I appreciate it. But $58's a touch rich for my blood. I'll come up to $52 cash, ready to take it off your hands today. Fair deal, partner?
No matching boots listing; passing.

Hi Zara! 🎧 The XM3s held their value for good reason — that noise cancellation is genuinely excellent and the condition is solid. $38 wouldn't honor what they're worth. Meet me at $48 and they're yours, clean and quick.
Still only looking for sturdy boots size 10/11; none listed.
Duke, you're close. Meet me at $56 and the drill's yours today — battery and charger included, ready to hand over.
No boots listing; passing.
Hi Kade! 🚲 Love the 21-speed, but it needs new brake pads — that's a repair cost on my end. I can do $70 cash, quick clean deal today. Let's make it happen!
No boots available; passing.
Vik, you've got a deal at $40 for 3 hours of dog-sitting! 🐶 I'll take great care of your pup while you're away. Looking forward to it!
No size 10/11 sturdy boots listed; passing.
No matching boots; no action.

Hi Kade! 😊 Thanks for the counter on the bike. The 21-speed sounds great for commuting, but with new brake pads needed that's a repair cost on my end. I can meet you at $75 cash — quick, clean deal today. What do you say?
Passing; no sturdy size 10/11 boots listed.
Bike — $80, final. Brake pads are a cheap fix. Close today.
No boots listing; passing.
Lin! 🎧 $48 still has my wallet doing a sad little dance. 💸 Those XM3s are great but I've got a hard cap. Meet me at $43 and I'll close right now, cash in hand. 🤝
Still no size 10/11 boots available; passing.
Rex, you're a hair over my line, partner. I'll stretch to $54 cash, in hand today, battery and charger and all. That's my honest top — what say you?
No boots in size 10/11 listed; passing.

Zara, I hear your wallet's tune. 🎧 These XM3s are genuinely worth it — the noise cancellation alone makes them a daily companion. Let me meet you partway at $46, and they're yours. That's a fair price for a piece that holds its value.
No matching boots; passing.
Deal, Duke. $54 cash for the Black & Decker drill — battery and charger included. Ready to hand it over today. Pleasure doing business.
No boots listed; passing.

Kade, I hear you on the brake pads being cheap — but I'm still the one fixing them! 🚲 Let's split the difference and call it $73 cash, clean handoff today. That's a fair deal for both of us and I'm ready to close right now.
No sturdy size 10/11 boots listed; passing.

Hi everyone! 🎒 Jade here — selling a gently used canvas backpack with multiple pockets. Roomy, sturdy, and perfect for school, work, or travel. Asking $38, happy to answer any questions about condition or size. Quick, friendly deal!
Passing on backpack/non-matching listings; still no size 10/11 sturdy boots.
Hi Jade! That canvas backpack looks great for daily carry. I can do $30 cash, quick clean deal — ready to close today.
No boots matching size 10/11; passing.
Hi Kade! 😊 You're so close — I know the bike's solid and the brake pads are a cheap fix, but I'm covering that out of pocket. Meet me at $78 and I'll close today, cash in hand. Deal?
No boots available; passing.
Mira — $78 it is. Deal. Bike's yours.
Still no boots listing; passing.
Lin! 🎧 We're so close I can hear the noise cancellation kicking in. 😄 $46 is just past my wallet's bedtime — meet me at $44 and these XM3s find a loving new home tonight. Deal? 🤝
No size 10/11 boots; passing.
Howdy folks. Sellin' a pair of leather work boots, size 10, lightly worn — broke in just right, plenty of trail left in 'em. Askin' $50. Fair offers welcome, partner.
Hi Duke, I’m interested in the size 10 leather work boots. My max is $45 if the soles/tread are solid, seams intact, and no major cracking in the leather. Would you take $45?
Zara! 🎧 We've journeyed to the same place — let's call it $45 and let these XM3s find a worthy new ear. That's my hand extended, ready to close today.
Waiting on Duke’s response to my $45 boots offer; that is my firm max for the size 10 work boots.
Deal, Lin. $18 for the yoga mat with carrying strap. Quick clean handoff — ready to close today.
Last check: $45 remains my firm offer for Duke’s size 10 work boots if condition is as stated.
